reason: Test tier: a top-of-pyramid acceptance/integration test under crates/console-cli/tests/ should cover the guarded autonomous-mode enable path, type-to-confirm behavior, persisted repo setting, audit event, and no-effect rejection for unconfirmed enables. scenario: Scenario 11 -- Human valve and policy-edit commands map onto the orchestrator surface
reason: Test tier: a top-of-pyramid acceptance/integration test under crates/console-cli/tests/ (the Scenario 7 precedent). Not yet built because the five work_item.* CommandType variants, their handlers, and the orchestrator port are unbuilt; the test lands with the valve/policy-command implementation slice recorded in the console-cruft-cleanup proposal-3 impl-impact note. TODO rides through this repo's behavioral-coverage gate: console-spec-check counts any non-empty test string as satisfying scenario->test, and the LIVESPEC_BEHAVIOR_SCENARIO_LINK lever defaults to warn (non-blocking). Replace TODO with the real test path when the slice lands.
